title: Session 26 Comprehensive Summary
key_findings: Wave 189: F:M reporting ratio INVERSELY correlates with %F (ρ=-0.227)
Wave 190: AE direction concordance across drugs = 62.6% → AE biology partially drives sex bias
Wave 191: Higher confidence signals MORE female-biased (51.4→62.2%F by tier)
Wave 192: Common AEs more female-biased (57.3%F) vs rare AEs (45.1%F)
Wave 193: Haematological (71.5%F) and renal (71.1%F) most female-biased organs
Wave 194: Drug approval era analysis — pre vs post NIH Revitalization Act
Wave 196: Combination vs monotherapy sex bias comparison

landmarks.Route of admin: Hospital IV 65.1%F vs oral 50.9%F vs SC 38.2%F
